hooks.statusMessage: Checking for uncommitted changes before deploy...
hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if re.search(r'vercel.*(--prod)', cmd):
    result = subprocess.run(['git.exe', '-C', '/mnt/d/My Projects/My Portfolio', 'status', '--porcelain'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if result.stdout.strip():
        print('{\"continue\": false, \"stopReason\": \"Uncommitted changes detected. Commit and merge a PR first before deploying.\"}')" 2>/dev/null || true
